tldr_zh: OpenAI發布健康智能和罕見疾病診斷新進展，美伊簽署終戰備忘錄，AI晶片和推理技術融資創新高。
tldr_en: OpenAI advances health AI and rare disease diagnosis; US-Iran war deal signed; AI chip and inference funding surge.

items.title_zh: OpenAI改進ChatGPT健康智能，推出GPT-5.5 Instant模型
items.title_en: OpenAI Improves Health Intelligence in ChatGPT with GPT-5.5 Instant
items.summary_zh: OpenAI推出GPT-5.5 Instant模型，以更強的推理能力、更好的語境理解和更清晰的溝通能力改進ChatGPT的健康與保健回應。新模型納入醫師評估，為用戶提供更可靠的健康建議。
items.summary_en: OpenAI launched GPT-5.5 Instant to enhance ChatGPT's health and wellness responses with stronger reasoning, better context, and physician-informed evaluations for more reliable health guidance.

items.title_zh: OpenAI推理模型助力罕見遺傳疾病診斷，新增18例診療突破
items.title_en: OpenAI Reasoning Model Helps Diagnose Rare Genetic Diseases in Children
items.summary_zh: 研究人員利用OpenAI推理模型協助診斷罕見遺傳疾病，在18個此前未確診的病例中實現診療突破。該研究展示了AI在醫療診斷中的重要應用潛力，特別是在複雜罕見病診斷領域。
items.summary_en: Researchers used OpenAI's reasoning model to help diagnose rare childhood genetic diseases, achieving 18 new diagnoses in previously unsolved cases and demonstrating AI's critical potential in medical diagnostics.

items.title_zh: OpenAI為企業版新增花費控制和使用分析功能
items.title_en: OpenAI Launches Spend Controls and Usage Analytics for ChatGPT Enterprise
items.summary_zh: OpenAI為ChatGPT Enterprise推出新的成本控制工具和使用分析功能，幫助企業更有效地管理AI支出並實現規模化應用。此舉符合OpenAI朝企業市場擴展的戰略方向。
items.summary_en: OpenAI introduced new spend controls and usage analytics for ChatGPT Enterprise, enabling organizations to manage costs and scale AI adoption more effectively.

items.title_zh: OpenAI IPO前夕招聘重量級人才，包括Transformer共同發明人
items.title_en: OpenAI Hires Transformer Co-Inventor Noam Shazeer Ahead of IPO
items.summary_zh: OpenAI在IPO前夕招聘Transformer共同發明人Noam Shazeer（來自Google DeepMind）和前特朗普AI政策官Dean Ball，強化技術和政策實力。此舉凸顯OpenAI為上市準備而進行的高管和專家團隊重組。
items.summary_en: OpenAI hired Transformer co-inventor Noam Shazeer from Google DeepMind and former Trump AI policy official Dean Ball in the same week, reinforcing its leadership ahead of IPO.

items.title_zh: AI推理新秀Baseten融資15億美元，估值達130億美元
items.title_en: AI Inference Startup Baseten Raises $1.5B at $13B Valuation
items.summary_zh: AI推理軟體新創公司Baseten正在完成15億美元融資，估值達130億美元。該融資反映了AI推理領域的融資熱潮，隨著企業對大型語言模型推理成本優化的需求增長。
items.summary_en: AI inference startup Baseten is finalizing a $1.5 billion funding round at a $13 billion valuation, reflecting surging investor interest in the inference sector.

items.title_zh: Snap將AI影片團隊分拆為獨立公司Dotmo，以控制成本
items.title_en: Snap Spins Off AI Video Team into New Company Dotmo
items.summary_zh: Snapchat母公司Snap將AI影片開發團隊分拆為新公司Dotmo，以應對AI研發的高昂成本。該舉表明大型科技公司正在調整AI開發策略，以提高效率並控制支出。
items.summary_en: Snap is spinning off its AI video team into a new independent company called Dotmo to manage costs more effectively amid rising AI development expenses.

items.title_zh: Midjourney進軍醫療影像領域，推出全身超音波掃描系統
items.title_en: Midjourney Launches Medical Imaging Division with Full-Body Ultrasound Scanner
items.summary_zh: 知名AI影像生成服務商Midjourney宣布成立Midjourney Medical，開發名為Midjourney Scanner的全身超音波掃描系統。該設備無需輻射或強磁場，計劃在60秒內完成全身掃描，預計2027年底在舊金山推出Midjourney Spa服務。
items.summary_en: Midjourney announced Midjourney Medical division developing a full-body ultrasound scanner without radiation or magnetic fields, aiming to complete scans in 60 seconds with service launch in San Francisco by late 2027.

items.title_zh: Amazon加速AI晶片銷售戰略，計畫向外部資料中心供應
items.title_en: Amazon Aims to Challenge Nvidia by Selling AI Chips Externally
items.summary_zh: Amazon Web Services正與外部資料中心進行談判，計畫對外銷售自家AI晶片。AWS執行長Andy Jassy表示這代表50億美元的商機，展現亞馬遜挑戰輝達市場主導地位的決心。
items.summary_en: Amazon Web Services is negotiating with external data centers to sell its AI chips, representing a $50 billion opportunity according to CEO Andy Jassy, directly challenging Nvidia's dominance.

items.title_zh: Google確認Android開發者驗證時程，企業應用生態強化安全
items.title_en: Google Confirms Timeline for Android Developer Verification System
items.summary_zh: Google正式公布Android開發者驗證系統的推出時程，新系統將從本月開始推出，9月起實施重大變更。此舉旨在加強應用生態系統的安全性並打擊惡意軟體。
items.summary_en: Google announced the timeline for rolling out Android developer verification system starting this month, with major changes beginning in September to strengthen app ecosystem security.

items.title_zh: FDA顧問團全票通過Moderna mRNA流感疫苗，全球首創
items.title_en: FDA Advisors Unanimously Approve Moderna's mRNA Flu Vaccine
items.summary_zh: FDA顧問委員會全票通過Moderna開發的全球首款mRNA流感疫苗。該疫苗代表mRNA技術在流感防治中的重大應用突破，標誌著個性化疫苗時代的到來。
items.summary_en: FDA advisory panel unanimously approved Moderna's first-of-its-kind mRNA flu vaccine, marking a major breakthrough in personalized vaccine development and mRNA technology applications.

items.title_zh: 美伊簽署終戰備忘錄，美軍解除伊朗港口海上封鎖
items.title_en: US and Iran Sign War End Deal, Lifting Naval Blockade
items.summary_zh: 美國與伊朗正式簽署結束中東戰爭的備忘錄，美軍隨即宣布解除對伊朗港口長達110多天的海上封鎖。雙方將開展為期60天的談判，涉及伊朗核計畫等議題。
items.summary_en: US and Iran signed a memorandum to end their war with the US lifting its 110+ day naval blockade of Iranian ports, with 60-day negotiations ahead on nuclear and other issues.

items.title_zh: 伊朗最高領袖批准終戰備忘錄，但表示持不同看法
items.title_en: Iran's Supreme Leader Approves War End Deal Despite Disagreeing
items.summary_zh: 伊朗最高領袖哈梅內伊批准了與美國達成的終戰備忘錄，但公開表示他「抱持不同看法」。這反映了伊朗領導層在該協議上的分歧。
items.summary_en: Iran's Supreme Leader Khamenei approved the war end memo with the US but stated he 'disagrees' with it, indicating divisions within Iranian leadership over the deal.

items.title_zh: Sanders提出70億美元AI主權計畫，目標保護美國AI產業控制權
items.title_en: Bernie Sanders Unveils $7 Trillion Plan for American AI Control
items.summary_zh: 美國參議員伯尼·桑德斯（Bernie Sanders）提出7萬億美元AI財富基金計畫，旨在賦予美國民眾對AI產業的控制權，並阻止大型科技公司壟斷AI開發。該計畫引發業界重大爭議。
items.summary_en: Senator Bernie Sanders unveiled a $7 trillion AI wealth fund plan to give Americans control over the AI industry, aiming to counter tech giants' dominance and likely drawing strong industry opposition.
